name: Dwolla
description: Dwolla — US ACH payment API platform for bank-to-bank transfers, mass payouts, and same-day ACH with white-label options.

seo.title: Dwolla — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Dwolla: Dwolla — US ACH payment API platform for bank-to-bank transfers, mass payouts, and same-day ACH with white-label options.

when_to_use: Mass ACH payouts to US bank accounts for gig economy and marketplace
Same-day ACH payment collection for subscription and invoice billing
Bank-to-bank transfer API for US fintech with white-label branding
Recurring ACH debit for B2B SaaS subscription payments in the US

cons: Integration sits above your compliance work
review.verdict: Focused US ACH API — great if ACH is all you need, limiting if you want a full payments stack.
review.best_for: US platforms needing white-label ACH transfers and mass payouts
review.not_for: Merchants needing card acceptance or non-US rails

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
